data.title: FLOKI price outlook: Aims for $0.00007-$0.00109 by Mar 2026 despite RSI at 42.32 (&0.704) shows technical vulnerability.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently experiencing a downward trend, as indicated by its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 42.32. Analysts have set price targets for FLOKI ranging from $0.00007 to $0.00109. A technical analysis reveals that there are key levels to watch for impending market shifts.

data.title: Curve (CRV) expected to bounce from $0.26, aiming for $0.32-$0.40 by March 2026 amid bearish market trend.
data.description: Forecasts for CRV's price indicate a possible rebound from oversold levels around $0.26, with technical analysis pointing towards price targets of $0.32-$0.40 by March. Despite facing bearish momentum, Curve is aiming for recovery in the coming weeks.

data.title: Worldcoin (WLD) price forecast: Estimated at $0.44-$0.62 by March 2026, currently trading at $0.40 with analyst targets $0.62-$0.73 by February.
data.description: The price of Worldcoin (WLD) currently stands at $0.40, accompanied by neutral RSI and a bearish MACD. Analysts predict a potential surge towards the $0.44 resistance level according to technical analysis. By February, experts believe the price could reach between $0.62 and $0.73.

data.title: SUI: Oversold at $0.97 but aiming for $1.10 by March 2026 despite bearish trend below moving averages.
data.description: The current trading price of SUI is $0.97, indicating oversold conditions that may lead to a potential increase to $1.10 by March 2026. However, caution is advised for investors as bearish momentum persists below important moving averages.

data.title: Speculation: OP may hit $0.21 by March from $0.19 amidst oversold RSI of 33.63. Technicals indicate $0.18 support trial.
data.description: The stock Optimism (OP) is currently trading at a value of $0.19 and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates oversold conditions at 33.63, which may result in a potential increase to a resistance level of $0.21. Technical analysis shows that there is a critical support level at $0.18 that will likely be tested in the near future.

data.title: Arbitrum aims for $0.13 rebound from oversold $0.11 with RSI at 32.47. Bearish trend continues.
data.description: The stock ARB is currently trading at $0.11, indicating oversold conditions with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 32.47. Technical analysis points towards a possible rebound to the $0.13 resistance level, despite ongoing bearish momentum observed in the moving averages.

data.title: APT price oversold at $0.92, may bounce to $1.20-$1.35 by March 2026 with RSI at 27.96. Analysts predict 4-6 week rise.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aptos (APT) is currently trading at $0.92, signaling deeply oversold conditions as indicated by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 27.96. Analysts specializing in technical analysis anticipate a potential rebound within the next 4-6 weeks, targeting a range between $1.20 and $1.35 for Aptos.

data.title: NEAR protocol priced at $1.05 shows oversold. Predicts a recovery to $1.50-$1.76 by March despite bearish signals.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $1.05 amidst oversold conditions being observed. Despite the present bearish signals, technical analysis indicates a potential recovery to the range of $1.50 to $1.76 by March.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) trading at $0.17 aims for $0.18-$0.20 by March with neutral RSI, despite short-term bearish trend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Stellar (XLM) is currently trading at $0.17, and neutral RSI signals indicate the possibility of a potential recovery towards the resistance zone of $0.18-$0.20. However, there is lingering bearish momentum in the short term.

data.title: TRON price predicted to reach $0.32-$0.35 by March 2026, showing 10-20% upside potential within 30 days from current $0.28 level.
data.description: Analysts predict that TRON (TRX) could see a 10-20% increase, reaching a range of $0.32 to $0.35 within the next 30 days. Currently, TRX is consolidating around the $0.28 support level with indicators showing neutral momentum.

data.title: Analyst cautions Bitcoin's status vs. gold at risk due to quantum threat, with 4M lost BTC and 12-year trend in doubt.
data.description: According to analyst Willy Woo, there is a growing concern in the market regarding the quantum threat. This has led to questioning the status of 4 million BTC that are considered "lost," as well as a 12-year valuation uptrend in comparison to gold.
